title: What's in the report from Trump's controversial religion commission
shortDescription: Trump's controversial Religious Liberty Commission released its draft report on religious freedom in the US. Here's what it says.

title: Trump attacks NYC rent freeze
shortDescription: President Trump criticizes New York City's rent freeze backed by Mayor Mamdani.

title: Trump returns to hotel that was site of assassination attempt
shortDescription: President Trump returned to the Washington Hilton, the site of an assassination attempt against him at the White House Correspondents' ​dinner.

title: Chicago man charged in alleged plot against White House UFC event
shortDescription: A Chicago man was charged with obstructing the investigation into the alleged plot against the White House UFC event, the Justice Department said.

title: Newsom supports a billionaire tax — just not California's
shortDescription: California Gov. Gavin Newsom argued that in order to address the issue of wealth inequality, the country needs to address loopholes in the tax code.

title: Trump's DOJ issues warning to California over new gun law. Why?
shortDescription: The Department of Justice argues the law limits citizens' ability to purchase 'legal firearms,' according to an open letter.

title: Trump critic pleads guilty in documents case
shortDescription: The former National Security Advisor entered a guilty plea Friday morning. He reached a plea deal earlier this month.

title: The Supreme Court just handed Trump a big win on immigration | The Excerpt
shortDescription: The Supreme Court ended a humanitarian program for immigrants, giving President Donald Trump a major win and leaving families in limbo.

title: The Supreme Court just handed Trump a big win on immigration
shortDescription: The Supreme Court ended a humanitarian program for immigrants, giving President Donald Trump a major win and leaving families in limbo.

title: Inside the Supreme Court fight over Trump’s Haiti rhetoric
shortDescription: Trump’s false claims about Haitian immigrants surfaced in the Supreme Court case. Justice Alito downplays them; Justice Kagan pushes back.

title: What House Speaker Mike Johnson said about World Cup fans
shortDescription: Mike Johnson says World Cup fans appreciate the United States more than "socialists," citing visitors' enthusiasm for American culture and pride.

title: Trump said pool work would cost $2M. Price was already quadruple that
shortDescription: An analysis by USA TODAY found that the government had already committed $8.5 million to fix the pool even though Trump said it would cost $2 million.
